def negative_flask_template_rendered_from_string_in_view():
    rule_id = "flask_template_rendered_from_string_in_view"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flask views render templates from inline strings instead of using file-backed templates."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
